query: SELECT id, targetDomain, method, success, errorMessage, durationMs, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created FROM ai_attack_history WHERE targetDomain LIKE '%hiawatha%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
